title: chore(deps): update dependency inquirer to v5
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [inquirer](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js) from `v4.0.0` to `v5.2.0`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.


<details>
<summary>Release Notes</summary>

### [`v5.2.0`](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/releases/v5.2.0)
[Compare Source](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/compare/v5.1.0...v5.2.0)
Now passing the `answers` hash in the `transformer` function arguments.

---

### [`v5.1.0`](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/releases/v5.1.0)
[Compare Source](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/compare/v5.0.1...v5.1.0)
- Added a `transformer` option to the `input` prompt allowing you to modify the displayed user input. (Useful to modify colors as user type, etc)

---

### [`v5.0.1`](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/releases/v5.0.1)
[Compare Source](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/compare/v5.0.0...v5.0.1)
- Fix bug with the `editor` prompt.

---

### [`v5.0.0`](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/releases/v5.0.0)
[Compare Source](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/compare/v4.0.2...v5.0.0)
**Breaking**: Upgrade to RxJS v5 which updates a bunch of Reactive interface method names.

For people not using the Reactive interface directly, this new major release should just work out of the box.

---

### [`v4.0.2`](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/releases/v4.0.2)
[Compare Source](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/compare/v4.0.1...v4.0.2)
Improve Windows rendering to properly match terminal size

---

### [`v4.0.1`](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/releases/v4.0.1)
[Compare Source](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/compare/v4.0.0...v4.0.1)
- Update dependency to fix a LGPL license issue.

---

</details>




---
